title: Schema v1 测试卷
subject: english
description: 用于测试 single_choice、cloze、reading、translation 和 essay 的兼容渲染。

questions.prompt: Artificial intelligence is developing so rapidly that its influence on modern life cannot be ______.

answer.rationale: cannot be ignored 为被动结构。

questions.title: 完形填空测试
questions.prompt: Choose the best answer for each blank.
questions.article: Modern students face more pressure than before. [[1]] they learn to manage time well, they can study more efficiently and live more healthily. Meanwhile, regular exercise is also important, [[2]] it helps reduce stress.

questions.title: 阅读理解测试
questions.prompt: Read the passage and answer the following questions.

passage.title: Healthy Study Habits
passage.content: Good study habits are important for college students. Making a study plan, reviewing in time and keeping a healthy lifestyle can improve both efficiency and confidence. In contrast, staying up too late often makes students tired and distracted in class.

questions.prompt: What is the passage mainly about?

options.text: Ways to form good study habits
How to make money in college

answer.rationale: 文章主要讲好的学习习惯。

questions.prompt: According to the passage, staying up too late may make students ______.

answer.rationale: 原文明确说 staying up too late often makes students tired and distracted in class。

questions.prompt: Translate the following sentence into Chinese.
questions.source_text: Only by making good use of time can college students improve their learning efficiency and reduce unnecessary pressure.

answer.reference_answer: 只有充分利用时间，大学生才能提高学习效率并减少不必要的压力。
alternate_answers: 只有好好利用时间，大学生才能提升学习效率，减轻不必要的压力。

scoring_points.point: 正确理解 Only by... can... 的倒装结构
准确表达 reduce unnecessary pressure

questions.title: 应用文写作测试
questions.prompt: For this part, you are supposed to write an email in at least 80 words.

requirements.topic: Write an email to your friend Jason to give him advice on how to live a healthier life.

answer.reference_answer:
Dear Jason,

I am writing to give you some advice on how to live a healthier life. First of all, you should go to bed early and get enough sleep every day. Secondly, it is a good idea to do more exercise and eat more fresh fruit and vegetables. Only in this way can you keep fit and study efficiently.

Yours,
Li Hua
